title: ECHS Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 30 Driver, Safaiwala and Other Posts
description: The Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme, Maharashtra (ECHS Maharashtra) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 30 Medical Officers, Dental Surgeons, Nursing Assistants, Lab Technicians, Pharmacists, and Drivers. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their MBBS, BDS, B. Pharm, D. Pharm, GNM, 10th, 12th, 8th, Any Degree, and DMLT can apply for the EC...
